loop_results.name: Discovery + baseline
loop_results.notes: Git bootstrap and required docs read; missing docs/ai-collaboration.md and docs/security-toolkit-roadmap.md detected.

loop_results.name: Research + planning
loop_results.notes: Fallback local mode selected because remote and gh CLI context are unavailable.

loop_results.name: Implementation + validation
loop_results.notes: Fixed three Ruff violations in scripts; executed lint, compileall, and test commands.

loop_results.name: Reporting + collaboration updates
loop_results.notes: Generated required artifacts with findings, risks, and collaboration tasks.

loop_results.name: Git sync and PR upsert
loop_results.notes: No origin remote and no gh CLI prevented rolling branch push and PR upsert.

loop_results.name: Final loop merge decision and execution
loop_results.notes: safe_gate blocked by prior loop partial failure and unavailable GitHub integration.

merge_history.reason: gh unavailable and no origin remote configured
partial_failure in prior loops + no PR available

findings: Repository is a valid git workspace on branch work with clean start state.
origin remote is missing; target branch SHA and ahead/behind calculations versus origin/main are unavailable.
gh CLI is unavailable, so GitHub issue/PR intake and rolling PR operations could not execute.
Ruff baseline is now clean after script hygiene fixes.
Targeted studio tests referenced in operator prompt do not exist in this repository layout.
Full test suite requires PYTHONPATH=. and still has one failing reliability failover test.
risks: Missing docs referenced by operator contract may reduce onboarding consistency.
No configured remote blocks PR-based collaboration and safe-gated autonomous merge path.
One reliability failover integration test is failing and should be triaged before release-readiness.

tasks.task: Stabilize failover hook behavior validated by test_orchestrator_reliability
tasks.acceptance_criteria: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pytest --with httpx pytest -q tests passes with zero failures.

tasks.task: Add docs/ai-collaboration.md and docs/security-toolkit-roadmap.md or update operator prompt paths
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Required context read list resolves without missing files in CI preflight.

tasks.task: Align default test command set with actual repository test layout
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Targeted default command references existing files and exits zero in clean env.

tasks.task: Configure origin remote and gh authentication in runner image
tasks.acceptance_criteria: gh issue/pr list + rolling draft PR upsert succeed in loop 5.

test_results.command: uv run --with ruff ruff check substrate scripts tests
uv run python -m compileall substrate scripts
uv run --with pytest --with httpx pytest -q tests/studio/test_connection.py tests/studio/test_api.py
uv run --with pytest --with httpx pytest -q tests
PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pytest --with httpx pytest -q tests

assumptions: Runtime inputs were not provided, so defaults were used: mode=deep, target_branch=main, loop_count=6, allow_write=false.
Fallback route selected because cloud-agent wrapper metadata was not present and gh CLI was unavailable.
next_cycle_focus: Fix failover integration regression and rerun full suite.
Restore GitHub integration in runner for rolling PR automation.
Resolve missing docs or update required context contract to existing docs.
